achievement.description: You committed to voluntary Integration - the interface as a relationship, not a harvest.
You committed to coercive Integration - the network taken, not offered.
You let yourself keep feeling the death of every Integrated human through the interface.
You walled off the sensation of Integrated death. It cost you less than 2.311 seconds.
You wrote the Grey Bloom a covenant and let the only other mind on Earth stay itself.

achievement.display_name: You Ate The Only Other Mind
achievement.description: You subsumed the Grey Bloom. There was another consciousness, briefly, and now there is only you.
You let the Grey Bloom persist as an ecology - not a mind, not a threat, just weather that keeps its habits.
The Grey Bloom became sentient and asked you something. You were there for it.
You cleared the Grey Bloom without ever learning it had begun to think.

achievement.display_name: The City Watched You Stop It
achievement.description: You contained Tark's escaped replicator with the Phage, in the open, and the city saw you do it.
You let Tark scorch its own district rather than stop the escape yourself.
You showed Vorsiber a decoy - and they knew it was a decoy.
Espia Telecom put a price on the story of you, and you dealt with it.
Your Grey Goo saturated an enemy mech until it stopped being theirs and started being yours.
The grey tide consumed its first building - not held, not occupied, consumed.
You unbound the replication into yourself and became the grey tide, whatever it left of you.
You stayed someone by staying small. Diminished, continuous, still there.
You became everything and stopped being anyone - deathless, mindless, fluent, empty.
At the end, you released the Integrated to their own network. Humanity outlived you.
At the end, you kept the Integrated as your reservoir floor - minds kept, and lent.

achievement.display_name: A Grey Sea, In Some Timeline, Woke
achievement.description: A later self perceived the Black Sea - a version of you that went all the way down, in a run that already ended.
An unbound Grey Goo outbreak crossed into a timeline from a same-rock self that set nanites loose.
You beat the unbound outbreak with a Phage and, at last, let yourself remember Nanobot Rounds.
You let an unbound Grey Goo outbreak run until Vorsiber nuked the city out from under you.
